children.name: Troglodytes
children.description: For their size, wrens produce one of the loudest songs of any bird — a rapid powerful torrent of trills carrying hundreds of metres through dense cover. In harsh Scandinavian winters dozens of wrens will huddle together in a nest box for warmth. One of Sweden's most widespread and numerous species despite its tiny size.

children.name: Troglodytes troglodytes
children.description: A tiny, round, cock-tailed bird that delivers an astonishingly loud, sustained trilling song from deep cover. In hard Scandinavian winters wrens huddle communally in nest boxes and cavities for warmth.
